mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki (id, project_id, version_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{versionId})

INSERT INTO wiki_version ( version_id, content, user_id, created_on, wiki_id, description, version_name, links ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{content}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{wikiId}, #{description}, #{versionName}, #{links} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM wiki_version WHERE wiki_id = #{wikiId} ORDER BY created_on DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
